title: Winejok Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Winejok, with a Z-Score of +3.40. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Winejok is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG. 
 The humidity is relatively moderate at 54%, but the wind speed of 2.7 km/h is not providing much relief. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
